about.title: About Vasavi Hotels
about.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Vasavi hotel community.
about.p1: Vasavi Hotels is the unified booking platform for distinctive boutique and guest houses across India — operating in fellowship with the ideals of Vasavi Clubs International.
about.p2: A need was strongly felt to bring the community to a common platform. HotelHub extends that legacy through premium hospitality, donor giving, and service at every property.
about.p3: Our hotels share one standard of excellence — heritage architecture, thoughtful amenities, and a commitment to giving back through community schemes.

healthCentre.title: Vasavi Health Centre
healthCentre.subtitle: Ask about health support, senior care, and peaceful stays near our guest houses — our team connects you with Vasavi community resources and suitable accommodations.
healthCentre.infoP1: The Vasavi Health Centre desk coordinates general wellness questions for pilgrims, families, and Vasavi Clubs International members. We do not replace emergency medical care — for urgent needs, please contact local hospital services.
healthCentre.infoP2: Many guests combine temple visits with restful stays at Vasavi guest houses. We can guide you on VKSP-related welfare queries and room options suited for recovery and senior travellers.
healthCentre.infoBullet1: Confidential handling of your query within 1–2 working days
healthCentre.infoBullet2: Guidance on VKSP, KCGF, and community welfare programmes
healthCentre.infoBullet3: Recommendations for guest houses with calm rooms and sattvic meals
healthCentre.querySubtitle: Fill in the form below. A coordinator will call or email you.
healthCentre.name: Full name
healthCentre.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Need a quiet room near Tirupati for post-darshan rest…
healthCentre.thankYou: Thank you. Our health desk will respond within 1–2 working days.
healthCentre.relatedIntro: These Vasavi properties are often chosen by families who want clean rooms, temple proximity, and community hospitality after travel or darshan.
healthCentre.relatedSentence1: Book a stay at Sri Venkateswara Pilgrim Stay when visiting Tirumala — annadanam and spiritual library support a calm pilgrimage rhythm.
healthCentre.relatedSentence2: Srisailam Mallikarjuna Bhakta Vasathi offers meditation-friendly corridors and prasadam for guests seeking quiet recovery time.
healthCentre.relatedSentence3: Hyderabad’s Sri Vasavi Nityannadana Residency connects easily to community kitchens and satsang halls for longer family visits.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.name: Name
contact.thankYou: Thank you — we will respond shortly.

donors.founderNote: The first Vasavi Club was founded on {{date}} in {{place}} with {{members}} members. HotelHub continues this tradition of community, service, and fellowship through hospitality.
donors.schemesIntro: Aligned with Vasavi Clubs International — your donations support education, welfare, and self-employment across the Vasavi community.
donors.tiersIntro: Contribution levels aligned with KCGF categories. Higher tiers unlock greater discounts and donor-exclusive room access.
donors.contactIntro: Questions about KCGF, VKSP, or membership? Contact Vasavi Clubs International at
donors.headline: Book More. Give More. Stay Better.
donors.introP1: HotelHub is the unified booking platform for eleven Vasavi-affiliated boutique hotels across India. Every stay supports the same spirit of service that has defined Vasavi Clubs International since 1961.
donors.introP2: When you join our donor program, your contributions strengthen community schemes — from the KCGF educational corpus to VKSP family welfare and Sreyobhilashi self-employment — while you enjoy exclusive room access, tiered discounts, and priority hospitality.
donors.perkKcgfDesc: Strengthen the K.C. Gupta Fellow fund for student aid, notebooks, and scholarships.
donors.perkVkspDesc: Support Vasavi Kutumba Suraksha Padhakam for members and their families.
donors.perkSeDesc: Fund interest-free loans and donation-driven enterprise for backward families.
donors.perkHotelDesc: Access donor-only rooms, 10–50% discounts, and priority service at all eleven hotels.
donors.step1Desc: Contribute to the KCGF corpus or a designated scheme (VKSP, Sreyobhilashi, Self Employment) via UPI, card, or net banking.
donors.step2Desc: Receive your Donor ID and tier confirmation by email. Link your Vasavi Club membership for combined benefits.
donors.step3Desc: Log in to the Donor Portal, apply your tier discount, and book across all eleven HotelHub properties.

schemesPage.title: Schemes Details
schemesPage.intro: HotelHub donations and donor contributions support the same community schemes administered by Vasavi Clubs International. Below is a summary of each program and how your hospitality giving makes an impact.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.p1: By using Vasavi Hotels and HotelHub, you agree to our booking policies, cancellation terms, and community conduct standards aligned with Vasavi Clubs International values.
termsPage.p2a: Donor contributions to KCGF and related schemes are voluntary and non-refundable except where required by law. Tier benefits apply as described on the
termsPage.p3: Room rates, availability, and amenities are subject to change. Confirmed bookings receive email confirmation with a reference number.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.p1: We respect your privacy. Personal data collected during booking (name, email, phone) is used only to process reservations and communicate about your stay.
privacyPage.p2: WhatsApp OTP sign-in stores your verified mobile number to personalize donor benefits and booking history. We do not sell personal data to third parties.
privacyPage.p3: Cookies may be used for analytics and preferences. You can manage cookie settings at any time via the banner on our site.
privacyPage.p4a: For questions, contact us via the

metadata.siteDescription: Experience divine temple elegance and premium Indian hospitality with Vasavi Hotels.
